case_title: HECTOR WALTER DAIL VS. MARVIN HALL ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAIL, HECTOR WALTER ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-16-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-16-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. NO COSTS ON THE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT ON THE DEFENDANTS CLAIM. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-16-2015 - JUDGMENT.
